groups.label: Setup
groups.description: Open the canonical scene, target the canonical avatar, and prepare the default ASM-Lite prefab scaffold in one operator-controlled setup suite.

suites.label: Setup Scene / Avatar / Prefab
suites.description: Open the canonical scene, open ASM-Lite, select Oct25_Dress, add the default prefab scaffold, and confirm the rebuild action is available when the operator runs this setup suite.
suites.expectedOutcome: The canonical scene is loaded, ASM-Lite targets Oct25_Dress, the prefab scaffold is present, and the rebuild action is visible without running lifecycle steps.
suites.debugHint: Run this combined setup suite before lifecycle or runtime suites when Unity is not already on the canonical scene/avatar/prefab context.

cases.label: Scene, avatar, and prefab setup
cases.description: Establish the canonical scene, editor avatar context, and prefab scaffold only when the operator runs this suite.
cases.expectedOutcome: Assets/Click ME.unity is loaded, ASM-Lite is attached to Oct25_Dress, and the primary rebuild action is visible.
cases.debugHint: If setup stalls, verify the scene and avatar names match the catalog fixture, inspect prefab prerequisites, and confirm the ASM-Lite window is not hidden behind another dock tab.

steps.label: Open Click ME scene
steps.description: Load the canonical smoke-test scene on operator request.
steps.expectedOutcome: Assets/Click ME.unity is the active Unity scene.
steps.debugHint: If the scene does not load, confirm the fixture scene exists at Assets/Click ME.unity.

steps.label: Open ASM-Lite window
steps.description: Open the product window through the automation entrypoint.
steps.expectedOutcome: The ASM-Lite window instance is available and focused for automation.
steps.debugHint: If no window appears, inspect editor layout state and window initialization logs.

steps.label: Select Oct25_Dress
steps.description: Bind the canonical avatar fixture to the automation window.
steps.expectedOutcome: Oct25_Dress is the active automation target in the ASM-Lite window.
steps.debugHint: If selection fails, confirm the avatar exists in Assets/Click ME.unity and is not hidden or renamed.

steps.label: Add ASM-Lite prefab
steps.description: Add the ASM-Lite prefab scaffold to the current automation target.
steps.expectedOutcome: The ASM-Lite prefab scaffold is attached to Oct25_Dress and generation-ready.
steps.debugHint: If add-prefab fails, inspect avatar prerequisites and generated asset path state before retrying.

steps.label: Verify rebuild action is visible
steps.description: Assert that the primary rebuild action is now available in the window.
steps.expectedOutcome: The primary rebuild action is visible, signaling that the scaffold install succeeded.
steps.debugHint: If the primary action does not change, inspect whether the prefab install completed and whether the window refreshed.

groups.label: Lifecycle
groups.description: Exercise the package-managed lifecycle actions that rewire or detach ASM-Lite content.

suites.label: Rebuild / Vendorize / Detach / Return
suites.description: Run the deterministic lifecycle roundtrip from rebuild through package-managed return.
suites.expectedOutcome: Lifecycle actions complete in order and the avatar returns to a clean package-managed ASM-Lite state.
suites.debugHint: If the roundtrip drifts, inspect generated asset ownership and whether the avatar still points at vendorized content.

cases.label: Package-managed roundtrip
cases.description: Confirm lifecycle actions can mutate state and return to the package-managed baseline.
cases.expectedOutcome: The lifecycle roundtrip completes without leaving the avatar in a detached or stale vendorized state.
cases.debugHint: Use generated asset paths and install-path diagnostics to isolate which lifecycle transition drifted.

steps.label: Rebuild ASM-Lite assets
steps.description: Rebuild generated ASM-Lite assets for the canonical avatar.
steps.expectedOutcome: Generated assets rebuild successfully and reflect the latest package-managed source.
steps.debugHint: If rebuild fails, inspect generated asset write locations and the selected avatar binding.

steps.label: Hygiene cleanup after rebuild
steps.description: Reset known ASM-Lite lifecycle drift before the next lifecycle action.
steps.expectedOutcome: Known ASM-Lite generated/vendorized state is returned to a package-managed baseline.
steps.debugHint: If hygiene cleanup fails, inspect package-managed restore and known generated asset paths before continuing.

steps.label: Vendorize generated assets
steps.description: Copy generated assets under Assets/ASM-Lite for vendorized workflow coverage.
steps.expectedOutcome: Vendorized generated assets exist and the avatar now points at the vendorized copy.
steps.debugHint: If vendorize fails, inspect whether the generated asset target path is writable and deterministic.

steps.label: Hygiene cleanup after vendorize
steps.description: Return known ASM-Lite vendorized state to package-managed baseline before detach coverage.
steps.expectedOutcome: Vendorized references and known generated state are cleaned back to package-managed baseline.
steps.debugHint: If hygiene cleanup fails, preserve the state for review and inspect stale vendorized references.

steps.label: Detach ASM-Lite component
steps.description: Detach the editable ASM-Lite component while preserving the baked content.
steps.expectedOutcome: The avatar is detached from the editable component without breaking the generated state.
steps.debugHint: If detach leaves a broken avatar, inspect component cleanup and generated controller references.

steps.label: Hygiene cleanup after detach
steps.description: Restore the detached avatar to package-managed baseline before final return verification.
steps.expectedOutcome: Detached state is recovered and known ASM-Lite generated state is package-managed again.
steps.debugHint: If hygiene cleanup fails, preserve the state for review and inspect detached recovery diagnostics.

steps.label: Return to package-managed state
steps.description: Reattach the avatar to package-managed ASM-Lite assets and clear vendorized drift.
steps.expectedOutcome: The avatar returns to a package-managed ASM-Lite state with no lingering vendorized dependency.
steps.debugHint: If return-to-package-managed fails, inspect whether detach or vendorize left stale asset references behind.

groups.label: Playmode / Runtime
groups.description: Validate the runtime-facing ASM-Lite path inside a playmode transition without restarting the host session.

suites.label: Enter / Validate / Exit Playmode
suites.description: Prepare the canonical avatar, enter playmode, validate runtime state, and return to edit mode.
suites.expectedOutcome: The canonical avatar enters playmode with valid runtime ASM-Lite state and exits back to edit mode cleanly.
suites.debugHint: If runtime validation fails, inspect whether the prefab scaffold was present before entering playmode and whether playmode exited cleanly.

cases.label: Runtime validation
cases.description: Prepare the avatar for runtime checks and verify the runtime component stays valid across the playmode boundary.
cases.expectedOutcome: ASM-Lite playmode preprocessing completes and returns to edit mode without requiring a new Unity session.
cases.debugHint: If playmode hangs or exits dirty, inspect editor scaffold setup, VRCFury/NDMF preprocessing, and playmode state transitions before rerunning.

steps.label: Open ASM-Lite window
steps.description: Open the product window before runtime setup begins.
steps.expectedOutcome: The ASM-Lite window is available for runtime preparation.
steps.debugHint: If the window is missing, inspect editor window lifecycle before entering playmode.

steps.label: Select Oct25_Dress
steps.description: Target the canonical avatar fixture before runtime preparation.
steps.expectedOutcome: Oct25_Dress is the active runtime-preparation target.
steps.debugHint: If selection fails, confirm the canonical avatar still exists in the loaded scene.

steps.label: Ensure ASM-Lite scaffold exists
steps.description: Add the ASM-Lite prefab scaffold if the avatar is not already prepared for runtime checks.
steps.expectedOutcome: The avatar has the ASM-Lite scaffold required for runtime validation.
steps.debugHint: If scaffold setup fails, inspect editor-side generation prerequisites before entering playmode.

steps.label: Enter playmode
steps.description: Transition the Unity host into playmode for runtime coverage.
steps.expectedOutcome: The host enters playmode and begins runtime validation on the canonical avatar.
steps.debugHint: If enter-playmode hangs, inspect unsaved scene prompts or compilation state before retrying.

steps.label: Validate runtime component
steps.description: Assert that ASM-Lite survives playmode preprocessing on the prepared avatar.
steps.expectedOutcome: The prepared avatar is valid after playmode preprocessing; editor-only ASM-Lite component stripping is accepted.
steps.debugHint: If runtime validation fails, inspect generated parameter/controller state, VRCFury/NDMF preprocessing, and avatar lookup diagnostics.

steps.label: Exit playmode
steps.description: Return the host to edit mode after runtime validation completes.
steps.expectedOutcome: The host exits playmode cleanly and returns to edit mode without restarting Unity.
steps.debugHint: If exit-playmode fails, inspect playmode teardown logs and pending scene state.
